hyperedges.label: Select Wrappers Form Reka/Shadcn Select API
Subtitle Cache Scopes Assets By Backend, Video, And Language
YouTube Overlay Mode Switch Rollback Workflow
Whisper CLI Transcription To VTT Pipeline

nodes.label: Lets Sub It README
nodes.rationale: Local-first self-hosted subtitle workbench: default mock mode avoids YouTube access, model downloads, and LLM calls; real mode enables the complete download-transcribe-translate-package chain.

nodes.label: YouTube Subtitle Translation PRD
nodes.rationale: Solves the problem that many public YouTube videos lack usable subtitles, while existing options are hard to deploy, debug, or use directly on the watch page.

nodes.label: Security and Privacy Boundaries
nodes.rationale: The system targets single-user local self-hosting, so provider keys stay in backend config, extension host permissions remain localhost-only, and private videos or auth bypass are excluded.

nodes.label: MVP Scope
nodes.rationale: The MVP keeps the system deployable and debuggable by using one Go service, one URL at a time, local cache, server persistence, and translated/bilingual modes only.

nodes.label: OpenAI-Compatible Translation Implementation Plan
nodes.rationale: Keeps mock runner unchanged while real runner parses source cues, invokes an injectable Translator, and uses fake translator in tests to preserve offline repeatability.

nodes.label: Backend VTT Cue Parser and Renderer
nodes.norm_label: backend vtt cue parser and renderer

nodes.label: Whisper SDK CLI Implementation Plan
nodes.rationale: Builds whisper/ as an independent Python subproject whose CLI can be called by the later Go runner through exec, with tests using fake models to avoid real model downloads.

nodes.label: Whisper CLI Argument and Output Contract
nodes.norm_label: whisper cli argument and output contract

nodes.label: 真实音频下载实现计划
nodes.rationale: 通过 RealRunner 和 LSI_RUNNER_MODE 分阶段替换 mock downloading，先接入 yt-dlp，后续阶段继续复用 mock，降低真实管线引入风险。
nodes.norm_label: 真实音频下载实现计划

nodes.label: yt-dlp 和 ffmpeg 启动检查
nodes.norm_label: yt-dlp 和 ffmpeg 启动检查

nodes.label: 后端 Docker 一键部署实现计划
nodes.rationale: 通过 docker compose up 部署 real runner 后端，把 Go、Python、whisper-cli、yt-dlp 和 ffmpeg 依赖封装进容器，避免用户手动安装。
nodes.norm_label: 后端 docker 一键部署实现计划

nodes.label: Background Service Worker HTTP 网关
nodes.rationale: 把所有 backend 网络请求集中到 background，避免 popup 和 content script 各自维护 fetch、URL 拼接、错误转换和缓存协调。
nodes.norm_label: background service worker http 网关

nodes.label: Backend Mock MVP 实施计划
nodes.norm_label: backend mock mvp 实施计划

nodes.label: 多阶段构建单镜像
nodes.rationale: 选中单镜像方案，因为双容器 HTTP 需要改后端架构且双容器共享卷复杂度高、收益不足。

nodes.label: Docker 默认本机端口绑定
nodes.rationale: 端口映射默认绑定 127.0.0.1，避免无鉴权 backend 暴露到局域网。
nodes.norm_label: docker 默认本机端口绑定

nodes.label: Real Runner 翻译链路
nodes.rationale: 在 real runner 的 translating 阶段补齐真实翻译，同时保持 HTTP API 不变，让 extension 不需要改动。

nodes.label: Translator 接口
nodes.rationale: 最小接口便于测试注入；接收完整 cue 列表让实现可以构建上下文窗口，同时对外返回等长翻译数组。

nodes.label: Chat Completions Translator
nodes.rationale: 优先使用 response_format json_object，因为 OpenAI-compatible 服务对 json_schema 支持差异更大，而 JSON object 足以表达单条 cue 翻译。

nodes.label: whisper-cli
nodes.rationale: 项目自有 CLI 控制输出格式、错误处理和退出码；Go runner 后续只依赖稳定黑盒命令契约。

nodes.label: Localhost Host Permissions
nodes.rationale: 只允许 localhost 和 127.0.0.1 backend 地址，权限提示更收敛并符合本地自托管联调边界。

nodes.label: Backend Mock MVP 设计
nodes.rationale: 采用真实 API 和真实持久化配合 mock runner，使前端可以并行联调，同时明确真实能力与 mock 能力边界。

nodes.label: whisper-cli README Contract
nodes.rationale: Documents setup, invocation, tests, and exit-code contract for the whisper-cli package.

nodes.label: Real Runner Download Transcribe Translate Pipeline
nodes.norm_label: real runner download transcribe translate pipeline

nodes.label: Job Reuse by videoId and targetLanguage
nodes.norm_label: job reuse by videoid and targetlanguage

nodes.label: Translator Interface
nodes.rationale: Defines the injectable translation boundary used by real runner and fake tests.

nodes.label: ChatTranslator
nodes.rationale: OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions translator implementation for per-cue subtitle translation.

nodes.label: ChatTranslator Translate
nodes.rationale: Loops over cues, translates each cue, and enforces output count alignment.

nodes.label: ChatTranslator Translate One Cue
nodes.rationale: Builds the chat request, applies timeout and authorization, validates JSON response, and returns one translation.

nodes.label: New Translation Prompt
nodes.rationale: Builds the target cue plus clipped context window used by the LLM.

nodes.label: Translation Context Radius
nodes.rationale: Sets the per-request context window to ten cues on either side of the target cue.

nodes.label: API Key Redaction
nodes.rationale: Removes the configured API key from non-2xx upstream error summaries.

nodes.label: ChatTranslator Context Window Tests
nodes.rationale: Verifies authorization, request count, target marker, context clipping, model requirement, redaction, and required translation field.

nodes.label: WebVTT Cue
nodes.rationale: Carries the timeline and text lines parsed from source WebVTT.

nodes.label: Parse WebVTT Cues
nodes.rationale: Validates WEBVTT header, cue blocks, timelines, and non-empty cue lists.

nodes.label: Cue Text
nodes.rationale: Joins multiline cue text for prompts and bilingual rendering.

nodes.label: Render Translated VTT
nodes.rationale: Creates translated subtitles while preserving source timelines and excluding source text.

nodes.label: Render Bilingual VTT
nodes.rationale: Creates bilingual subtitles by combining source cue text and translated text on the same timeline.

nodes.label: Validate Translation Text
nodes.rationale: Rejects empty translations, blank lines, and timeline markers before VTT packaging.

nodes.label: VTT Cue Rendering Tests
nodes.rationale: Tests parsing, source timeline preservation, bilingual composition, count matching, and invalid translation rejection.

nodes.label: Mock WebVTT Assets
nodes.rationale: Provides static source, translated, and bilingual VTT content for offline mock runner behavior.

nodes.label: Transcribe Audio
nodes.rationale: Executes whisper-cli with input, output, model, compute type, and language arguments, then verifies source.vtt exists and is non-empty.

nodes.label: whisper-cli Command
nodes.rationale: Local CLI boundary used by Go runner for faster-whisper transcription.

nodes.label: Download Audio
nodes.rationale: Behavior under test: creates job directory, invokes yt-dlp, returns audio.mp3, and propagates command failures.

nodes.label: MockRunner
nodes.rationale: Offline runner that simulates every lifecycle stage and writes static subtitle files.

nodes.label: MockRunner Start
nodes.rationale: Advances downloading, transcribing, translating, packaging, and completed statuses while creating subtitle assets.

nodes.label: MockRunner Failure Handling
nodes.rationale: Marks jobs failed at the active stage with Chinese failure progress text and the cause message.

nodes.label: MockRunner Failure Path Tests
nodes.rationale: Verifies completion, cancellation, and store update failures are surfaced as failed jobs.

nodes.label: RealRunner Pipeline Tests
nodes.rationale: Tests real-mode orchestration across yt-dlp, whisper-cli, translator output, VTT assets, and stage-specific failures.

nodes.label: Fake Translator
nodes.rationale: Test double for Translator that can return fixed translations or an injected error.

nodes.label: SubtitleAsset Model
nodes.rationale: Stores completed source, translated, and bilingual VTT paths for a job/video/language pair.

nodes.label: New Job Constructor
nodes.rationale: Initializes queued job records with default Chinese progress text and attempt count.

nodes.label: SQLite Store
nodes.rationale: GORM-backed persistence boundary for jobs and subtitle assets.

nodes.label: SQLite Foreign Key DSN
nodes.rationale: Ensures SQLite connections enable foreign key enforcement.

nodes.label: Find Reusable Job
nodes.rationale: Looks up the newest non-failed job by videoId and targetLanguage for deduplication.

nodes.label: Find Latest Job
nodes.rationale: Finds the newest job by videoId and targetLanguage even when failed, supporting progress restoration.

nodes.label: Update Job Status
nodes.rationale: Updates status, stage, progress text, and nullable error message, returning not found when no row changes.

nodes.label: Create Subtitle Asset
nodes.rationale: Persists the generated subtitle asset index after packaging.

nodes.label: Find Subtitle Asset
nodes.rationale: Retrieves completed assets by videoId and targetLanguage or by jobId.

nodes.label: Store AutoMigrate
nodes.rationale: Creates or updates Job and SubtitleAsset schemas through GORM AutoMigrate.

nodes.label: SQLite Persistence Tests
nodes.rationale: Covers job creation, reuse semantics, latest lookup, asset lookup, status updates, quiet not-found handling, and orphan rejection.

nodes.label: Self-Hosted YouTube Subtitle Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Describes the end-to-end system from extension job creation through backend runner, local transcription, translation, packaging, and playback.

nodes.label: Job State Flow
nodes.rationale: Defines queued, downloading, transcribing, translating, packaging, completed, and failed lifecycle states.

nodes.label: Security and Privacy Boundaries
nodes.rationale: Restricts scope to public YouTube videos, backend-only API keys, local disk storage, localhost permissions, and safe file serving.

nodes.label: Extension Backend Contract
nodes.rationale: Specifies background as HTTP gateway, job and subtitle endpoints, storage cache, and translated/bilingual subtitle modes.

nodes.label: Docs Chinese Language Policy
nodes.rationale: Requires Chinese prose for all documentation under docs while allowing code, commands, paths, and proper nouns.

nodes.label: OpenAI-Compatible Translation Plan
nodes.rationale: Plans the Translator interface, Chat Completions translator, cue parsing/rendering, real runner integration, LLM config, and docs updates.

nodes.label: Whisper SDK CLI Plan
nodes.rationale: Plans the Python whisper-cli package, VTT rendering and validation, stdout JSON contract, exit codes, and faster-whisper adapter.

nodes.label: Real Audio Download Plan
nodes.rationale: Plans RealRunner mode selection, yt-dlp MP3 download, fake exec tests, and tool availability checks.

nodes.label: Docker Deployment Plan
nodes.rationale: Plans a one-command backend deployment image bundling Go server, whisper-cli venv, yt-dlp, ffmpeg, volumes, and env configuration.

nodes.label: Extension MVP Plan
nodes.rationale: Plans the WXT/Vue extension, message protocol, backend client, storage cache, popup workflow, VTT parser, and YouTube overlay.

nodes.label: Backend Mock MVP Plan
nodes.rationale: 分任务规划 Go backend mock MVP 的配置、SQLite store、API、runner 和测试落地顺序。

nodes.label: Backend Mock MVP Design
nodes.rationale: 定义后端第一阶段的 HTTP API、SQLite 数据模型、job 状态机、字幕资产和 mock runner 边界。

nodes.label: Extension MVP Design
nodes.rationale: 定义 Chrome MV3 extension 的 popup、background HTTP gateway、YouTube content script、storage、消息协议和测试策略。

nodes.label: Whisper CLI Contract
nodes.rationale: 定义 whisper-cli 的本地音频输入、source.vtt 输出、JSON stdout 和稳定退出码契约。

nodes.label: Real Audio Download Design
nodes.rationale: 设计 LSI_RUNNER_MODE=real 时用 yt-dlp 替换 downloading 阶段并生成 audio.mp3。

nodes.label: Chat Completions Translation Design
nodes.rationale: 设计 real runner 的 VTT cue 解析、OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions 翻译、translated.vtt 与 bilingual.vtt 生成。

nodes.label: Backend Docker Deployment Design
nodes.rationale: 选择多阶段单镜像方案，将 Go backend、whisper-cli、yt-dlp、ffmpeg 和 real runner 配置打包进 compose 部署。

nodes.label: Extension Manifest Config
nodes.rationale: WXT 配置声明 MV3 manifest、storage/activeTab/alarms 权限、本机 backend host_permissions，以及 Vue/Tailwind 插件和 @ alias。

nodes.label: Extension Vitest Config
nodes.rationale: Vitest 配置使用 Vue 插件、WXT fake browser 插件、jsdom 环境和 mock 清理策略。

nodes.label: Extension Runtime README
nodes.rationale: 说明 extension 安装、开发、测试、构建、默认 backend URL 和 popup 通过 active job 恢复进度的行为。

nodes.label: YouTube Shadow Overlay Entrypoint
nodes.rationale: YouTube watch 页面 content script 通过 WXT Shadow Root UI 挂载 Vue YoutubeOverlay。

nodes.label: Background Service Worker
nodes.rationale: background 注册 alarms 和 runtime message listener，并在启动时恢复持久化 job monitors。

nodes.label: Popup App
nodes.rationale: popup Vue 组件管理 backend URL、YouTube URL、语言、job 提交、轮询、active job 恢复和字幕完成通知。

nodes.label: submitJob
nodes.rationale: 提交表单时先保存 settings，再发送 job:create 并启动当前 job 轮询。

nodes.label: pollJob
nodes.rationale: 轮询 job:get，完成时解析字幕资产并通知页面，失败时停止并展示错误。

nodes.label: restoreJobForCurrentTab
nodes.rationale: popup 打开时根据当前 YouTube tab 的 videoId 和目标语言查询 job:active 并恢复轮询状态。

nodes.label: Popup Vue Mount
nodes.rationale: popup entrypoint 导入全局样式并把 App 挂载到 #app。

nodes.label: Popup HTML Shell
nodes.rationale: popup HTML 壳设置 zh-CN、viewport、标题和 main.ts module script。

nodes.label: Popup Active Job Restore Test
nodes.rationale: 测试 popup 打开时读取 settings、当前 YouTube tab，并发送 job:active 恢复转写中任务。

nodes.label: Extension Test Harness Smoke Test
nodes.rationale: 最小 Vitest scaffold 测试，用于确认测试框架可运行。

nodes.label: createBackendClient
nodes.rationale: 根据本机 backend origin 创建 typed client，封装 /jobs、/jobs/active、/subtitle-assets 和 /subtitle-files 调用。

nodes.label: normalizeBackendBaseUrl
nodes.rationale: 校验 backendBaseUrl 只能是带显式端口的 http localhost 或 127.0.0.1 origin。

nodes.label: Backend Request Error Mapping
nodes.rationale: request 将 fetch 失败映射为 network_error，并把 backend JSON error 转成 BackendClientError。

nodes.label: Backend Client Contract Tests
nodes.rationale: 覆盖 create job、active job、subtitle asset、subtitle file、URL 校验、JSON error 和 network_error 行为。

nodes.label: Extension Message Protocol
nodes.rationale: 定义 LanguageCode、SubtitleMode、Job、SubtitleAsset、Settings、ExtensionMessage、MessageResult 和 sendExtensionMessage。

nodes.label: assertDifferentLanguages
nodes.rationale: 对 sourceLanguage 和 targetLanguage 相同的请求抛出错误。

nodes.label: sendExtensionMessage
nodes.rationale: 通过 browser.runtime.sendMessage 发送 typed ExtensionMessage 并返回统一 MessageResult。

nodes.label: Persisted Job Monitoring
nodes.rationale: 用 storage local:jobMonitors 和 chrome alarms 在 popup 关闭后继续恢复 job 轮询。

nodes.label: startJobMonitor
nodes.rationale: 添加 persisted monitor、创建 alarm，并对新 monitor 立即执行一次 pollJob。

nodes.label: handleJobMonitorAlarm
nodes.rationale: 根据 alarm name 定位 persisted monitor，存在则 pollJob，不存在则清理 alarm。

nodes.label: ensurePersistedJobMonitors
nodes.rationale: background 启动时为所有 persisted monitors 补建 chrome alarms。

nodes.label: pollJob
nodes.rationale: 查询 job 状态；completed 时缓存资产并通知 YouTube tab，failed 时停止 monitor，其他状态继续确保 alarm。

nodes.label: cacheAndNotify
nodes.rationale: job completed 后查询 subtitle asset，以 translated 为默认模式写缓存，并广播字幕更新。

nodes.label: Persisted Job Monitor Tests
nodes.rationale: 覆盖完成缓存通知、重复 monitor、跨 backend origin、alarm 恢复、设置切换、广播失败容忍和并发启动。

nodes.label: handleExtensionMessage
nodes.rationale: Central runtime message dispatcher that maps extension message types to settings, backend job, subtitle asset, subtitle file, and subtitle mode operations.

nodes.label: MessageHandlerDeps
nodes.rationale: Dependency injection shape for fetch, clock, and job monitor used to keep the handler testable.

nodes.label: clientFromSettings
nodes.rationale: Helper that reads persisted settings and creates a backend client from the configured backend origin.

nodes.label: updateSubtitleMode
nodes.rationale: Helper for subtitle:update-mode messages that persists the selected subtitle mode for a video/language/backend combination.

nodes.label: ok Result Wrapper
nodes.rationale: Small helper that normalizes successful runtime message responses as { ok: true, data }.

nodes.label: errorToMessage
nodes.rationale: Error normalization helper that maps backend errors, invalid language pairs, and unknown exceptions into MessageError payloads.

nodes.label: Job Create Flow
nodes.rationale: The job:create branch validates language pair, persists language settings, creates a backend job, and starts monitoring without blocking the response.

nodes.label: Subtitle Resolve Flow
nodes.rationale: The subtitle:resolve branch chooses target language from per-video preference or settings, checks local cache, fetches completed assets from backend, and stores them with a selected mode.

nodes.label: handleExtensionMessage Test Suite
nodes.rationale: Vitest suite covering handler validation, backend calls, monitor behavior, settings validation, and subtitle cache behavior.

nodes.label: queuedJob Fixture
nodes.rationale: Reusable queued job object used by handler tests to simulate backend job responses.

nodes.label: Invalid Language Pair Behavior
nodes.rationale: Tested behavior that job creation rejects equal source and target languages before calling fetch.

nodes.label: Job Monitor Fire-and-Forget Behavior
nodes.rationale: Tested behavior that successful job creation starts a monitor and still returns success if monitor startup rejects.

nodes.label: Backend Origin Cache Isolation
nodes.rationale: Tested behavior that subtitle cache entries are keyed by backend origin so switching localhost ports does not reuse stale assets.

nodes.label: Alert Component
nodes.rationale: Vue alert shell that applies alertVariants, merges caller classes, exposes role=alert, and renders slot content.

nodes.label: AlertDescription Component
nodes.rationale: Alert text subcomponent that supplies muted description styling and class passthrough.

nodes.label: AlertTitle Component
nodes.rationale: Alert title subcomponent that applies title typography and class passthrough.

nodes.label: alertVariants
nodes.rationale: Class variance configuration for default and destructive alert variants.

nodes.label: Badge Component
nodes.rationale: Reka Primitive-backed badge that delegates primitive props, applies badgeVariants, and supports class passthrough.

nodes.label: badgeVariants
nodes.rationale: Class variance configuration for default, secondary, destructive, and outline badge styles.

nodes.label: Button Component
nodes.rationale: Reka Primitive-backed button that forwards primitive rendering options and applies variant/size styling.

nodes.label: buttonVariants
nodes.rationale: Class variance configuration for button visual variants and sizes including icon sizes.

nodes.label: Card Component
nodes.rationale: Card container component that establishes the background, border, spacing, shadow, and class passthrough for card layouts.

nodes.label: CardHeader Component
nodes.rationale: Card header layout that adapts to a card action slot with grid columns and spacing.

nodes.label: CardTitle Component
nodes.rationale: Card title typography component using an h3 with class passthrough.

nodes.label: CardDescription Component
nodes.rationale: Card description typography component for muted supporting text.

nodes.label: CardContent Component
nodes.rationale: Card content region component with horizontal padding and class passthrough.

nodes.label: CardFooter Component
nodes.rationale: Card footer region component for aligned footer content.

nodes.label: CardAction Component
nodes.rationale: Card action region component positioned for header action controls.

nodes.label: Input Component
nodes.rationale: Text input component that bridges defaultValue/modelValue through useVModel and applies form-control styling.

nodes.label: SelectItem Component
nodes.rationale: Reka SelectItem wrapper that forwards item props, renders selected-state indicator, and displays item text through slots.

nodes.label: SelectTrigger Component
nodes.rationale: Reka SelectTrigger wrapper that forwards trigger props, supports sm/default sizes, and renders a chevron icon through SelectIcon.

nodes.label: Shared Class Passthrough Pattern
nodes.rationale: Most UI components accept an optional class prop and merge it with base Tailwind classes via cn for local customization.

nodes.label: Reka Primitive Wrapper Pattern
nodes.rationale: Badge, Button, SelectItem, and SelectTrigger wrap Reka primitives while delegating supported props and adding project styling.

nodes.label: Select Content Wrapper
nodes.rationale: Vue wrapper forwards Reka select content props/emits, applies popper-aware Tailwind classes, and nests viewport plus scroll controls.

nodes.label: Select Group Wrapper
nodes.rationale: Minimal Vue wrapper passes SelectGroup props and slot content through to the Reka primitive.

nodes.label: Select Separator Wrapper
nodes.rationale: Select menu separator removes class from delegated props and merges default separator styling with caller classes.

nodes.label: Select Scroll Up Button Wrapper
nodes.rationale: Scroll-up wrapper forwards Reka props and renders a ChevronUp fallback icon inside the select content scroll control.

nodes.label: Select Scroll Down Button Wrapper
nodes.rationale: Scroll-down wrapper forwards Reka props and renders a ChevronDown fallback icon inside the select content scroll control.

nodes.label: Select Value Wrapper
nodes.rationale: Minimal Vue wrapper forwards SelectValue props and slot content to the Reka primitive.

nodes.label: Select Label Wrapper
nodes.rationale: Select label wrapper applies muted label typography while allowing caller class extension.

nodes.label: Select Root Wrapper
nodes.rationale: Select root wrapper forwards root props and emits to Reka SelectRoot and exposes slot props to callers.

nodes.label: Select Item Text Wrapper
nodes.rationale: Minimal Vue wrapper forwards SelectItemText props and slot content to the Reka primitive.

nodes.label: Select Component Barrel
nodes.rationale: Barrel file exposes the local select wrapper components as the module public API.

nodes.label: Separator Wrapper
nodes.rationale: Reusable separator wrapper defaults to horizontal decorative mode and maps orientation data attributes to dimensions.

nodes.label: Separator Component Barrel
nodes.rationale: Barrel file exposes the separator wrapper as the module public API.

nodes.label: Class Name Merge Utility
nodes.rationale: Local helper combines clsx conditional class building with tailwind-merge conflict resolution.

nodes.label: Create Job Form Shape
nodes.rationale: Popup form contract includes backend URL, YouTube URL, and distinct source/target language codes.

nodes.label: Create Job Form Validator
nodes.rationale: Validator returns Chinese error messages for missing backend URL, missing YouTube URL, and identical source/target languages.

nodes.label: Create Job Form Validation Tests
nodes.rationale: Vitest suite covers valid input and each validation error returned by validateCreateJobForm.

nodes.label: Default Extension Settings
nodes.rationale: Frozen fallback settings point to local backend with English source and Chinese target language.

nodes.label: Read Extension Settings
nodes.rationale: Reads settings from WXT local storage and returns a shallow copy to protect the fallback object from mutation.

nodes.label: Update Extension Settings
nodes.rationale: Merges a settings patch, enforces distinct languages, normalizes backend origin, persists, and returns normalized settings.

nodes.label: Create Language Pair
nodes.rationale: Small helper enforces the same distinct-language invariant before returning a language pair object.

nodes.label: Settings Storage Tests
nodes.rationale: Vitest suite verifies defaults, copy semantics, URL normalization, language rejection, and failed persistence on invalid backend URLs.

nodes.label: Video Preference Shape
nodes.rationale: Per-video preference stores target language and selected subtitle mode.

nodes.label: Subtitle Asset Cache Entry
nodes.rationale: Cached subtitle asset extends backend subtitle asset data with selected mode and last synchronization timestamp.

nodes.label: Subtitle Asset Storage Key
nodes.rationale: Builds encoded WXT local-storage keys scoped by normalized backend origin, video id, and target language.

nodes.label: Video Preference Storage Key
nodes.rationale: Builds encoded WXT local-storage keys scoped by normalized backend origin and video id.

nodes.label: Read Cached Subtitle Asset
nodes.rationale: Reads a subtitle asset cache entry for a backend/video/language tuple from WXT local storage.

nodes.label: Write Cached Subtitle Asset
nodes.rationale: Persists an enriched subtitle cache entry and updates the associated video preference.

nodes.label: Read Video Preference
nodes.rationale: Reads the last selected target language and subtitle mode for a backend/video pair.

nodes.label: Write Video Preference
nodes.rationale: Persists video preference without storing backendBaseUrl inside the value because it is encoded in the key.

nodes.label: Update Cached Subtitle Mode
nodes.rationale: Updates selected mode on an existing cached subtitle asset and keeps video preference in sync.

nodes.label: Subtitle Cache Storage Tests
nodes.rationale: Vitest suite covers asset reads, preference writes, mode updates, special video ids, target-language isolation, and backend-origin isolation.

nodes.label: YouTube Subtitle Overlay Component
nodes.rationale: Content-script Vue component resolves cached subtitles for the current YouTube video, fetches VTT files, tracks active cue text, and renders overlay controls.

nodes.label: Load Subtitles For Video
nodes.rationale: Resets current subtitle state, resolves a subtitle asset through extension messaging, handles stale requests, and starts VTT loading.

nodes.label: Load Selected VTT File
nodes.rationale: Fetches the selected subtitle mode file for the current asset, parses VTT cues, updates status, and binds cue updates to the video element.

nodes.label: Change Subtitle Mode
nodes.rationale: Persists a translated/bilingual mode change, attempts VTT reload, and rolls back both storage and displayed subtitles when the switch fails.

nodes.label: Bind Overlay To Video Time
nodes.rationale: Attaches timeupdate and seeked listeners to the YouTube video element and updates active subtitle text from the current time.

nodes.label: Reset Loaded Subtitles
nodes.rationale: Removes video listeners and clears cue and active-text state.

nodes.label: Restore Displayed Subtitles
nodes.rationale: Restores prior cues and active text after mode-switch failure and rebinds video listeners when cues exist.

nodes.label: Subtitle Updated Message Guard
nodes.rationale: Runtime message type guard accepts only lets-sub-it subtitle update notifications with a string video id.

nodes.label: YouTube Overlay Mode Rollback Tests
nodes.rationale: Vitest component tests verify mode-switch failure paths restore previous subtitles, persist rollback when possible, and surface rollback errors.

nodes.label: Active Cue Boundary Tests
nodes.rationale: Vitest tests specify active-cue lookup semantics: current time must be inside start-inclusive, end-exclusive cue ranges.

nodes.label: Extension VTT Cue
nodes.rationale: TypeScript cue shape used by extension subtitle parsing and active-cue lookup.

nodes.label: parseVtt
nodes.rationale: Parses WebVTT text into extension cue objects and rejects VTT content without cues.

nodes.label: parseTimestamp
nodes.rationale: Converts HH:MM:SS.mmm WebVTT timestamps into seconds for cue matching.

nodes.label: findActiveCue
nodes.rationale: Finds the cue whose start/end interval contains the current YouTube playback time.

nodes.label: parseYouTubeWatchVideoId
nodes.rationale: Extracts the v query parameter from supported youtube.com watch URLs and rejects invalid hosts or paths.

nodes.label: getVideoIdFromLocationHref
nodes.rationale: Adapter that derives a watch video id from a supplied location href.

nodes.label: getCurrentVideoId
nodes.rationale: Reads window.location.href and resolves the current YouTube watch video id.

nodes.label: watchVideoIdChanges
nodes.rationale: Registers YouTube SPA navigation and popstate listeners to notify when the active video id changes.

nodes.label: Extension VTT Parser Tests
nodes.rationale: Vitest coverage for WebVTT cue parsing, multiline text preservation, and no-cue rejection.

nodes.label: YouTube Video Id Tests
nodes.rationale: Vitest coverage for YouTube watch URL parsing across supported hosts, unsupported paths, unsupported hosts, and invalid URLs.

nodes.label: YouTube Page Watch Tests
nodes.rationale: Vitest coverage for location-href video id extraction on and off YouTube watch pages.

nodes.label: Whisper Segment
nodes.rationale: Frozen dataclass representing transcription segment start, end, and text before WebVTT rendering.

nodes.label: format_timestamp
nodes.rationale: Formats floating-point seconds as WebVTT timestamps while rejecting negative time.

nodes.label: format_timestamp_from_milliseconds
nodes.rationale: Formats integer milliseconds as WebVTT timestamps and is used by VTT rendering after rounding.

nodes.label: render_vtt
nodes.rationale: Renders validated Segment sequences into WebVTT, enforcing non-empty text, monotonic starts, valid durations, and safe cue text.

nodes.label: InputValidationError
nodes.rationale: Domain exception used to classify invalid model or language selections as input validation failures.

nodes.label: TranscriptionResult
nodes.rationale: Dataclass carrying detected language, duration, and rendered Segment list from transcription to CLI output.

nodes.label: _raise_input_validation_error
nodes.rationale: Maps selected faster-whisper ValueError messages to the package's input validation exception.

nodes.label: transcribe_audio
nodes.rationale: Builds a faster-whisper model, validates language compatibility, converts SDK segments into local Segment objects, and returns TranscriptionResult.

nodes.label: build_parser
nodes.rationale: Defines required whisper-cli arguments for input, output, model, language, and optional compute type.

nodes.label: whisper-cli main
nodes.rationale: Coordinates CLI validation, transcription, VTT rendering, UTF-8 output writing, JSON summary printing, and exit-code mapping.

nodes.label: main_entry
nodes.rationale: Console entry wrapper that exits with the return code from main.

nodes.label: Whisper VTT Tests
nodes.rationale: Pytest coverage for VTT header/cue rendering and validation failures for empty, rounded zero-duration, negative, blank-line, and separator-containing segments.

nodes.label: Whisper Transcribe Tests
nodes.rationale: Pytest coverage for SDK adapter behavior using fake models, compute-type forwarding, duration handling, empty segment pass-through, and English-only model validation.

nodes.label: Whisper CLI Tests
nodes.rationale: Pytest coverage for CLI arguments, parent directory creation, JSON success output, exit-code mapping, compute-type forwarding, path validation, and UTF-8 writing.

hyperedges.label: Select Wrappers Form Reka/Shadcn Select API
Subtitle Cache Scopes Assets By Backend, Video, And Language
YouTube Overlay Mode Switch Rollback Workflow
Whisper CLI Transcription To VTT Pipeline
